deploy._comment_startCommand: Empty — Dockerfile CMD invokes /app/entrypoint.sh which reads env vars (IS_VALIDATOR, SEED_ADDR, EXOCHAIN_DATA_DIR, PORT, P2P_PORT, VALIDATORS).
deploy._comment_healthcheckTimeout: Per-probe timeout in seconds. Lowered from 300 → 15 so a hung /health fails fast instead of delaying failed deploys by 5 minutes. (A-042)
